articles.title: Gemini app starts rolling out Personal Intelligence globally - 9to5Google
articles.description: After the US launch, Google is bringing Personal Intelligence to Gemini users around the world (excluding Europe).
articles.content:

articles.author: Christian Edwards
articles.title: Trump and Putin just lost their ‘poster boy’ in Europe. What now for Hungary? - CNN
articles.description: In recent decades, the United States and Russia have rarely backed the same candidate in a foreign election. Hungary’s Viktor Orbán was an exception. But as it turned out, they backed the loser.
articles.content:
